series_metadata.series_description: Files contain active and inactive case documents, including pertinent supportive information (complaints and hearing records), and may include final disposition and informal complaint.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 60 days after hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), indexed and quality control is complete, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years then destroy provided records are no longer of administrative or legal value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
